terms-gate.title: Terms and Conditions

checkboxes.acceptTerms: I accept the terms and conditions

terms-gate.body:
Effective Date: May 15, 2026.

Entity: Caravana Studio LLC (Delaware, USA).

Contact: gm@jokersofneon.com.

Privacy Policy: https://jokersofneon.com/privacy-policy

TL;DR (Summary)

• MiniPay-only version of Jokers of Neon.
• Operated by Caravana Studio LLC and not operated by Opera or MiniPay.
• You must be 18+ and use a valid MiniPay wallet.
• Core gameplay is skill-based, with some random elements.
• Final game state and official leaderboard results are recorded on CELO.
• If anything conflicts, the CELO contract record prevails.
• Tournaments may award USDT or USDC prizes on CELO.
• Tournament entry is currently free, but paid formats may exist later.
• Fraud, bots, multi-accounting, exploits, or rule-breaking can lead to bans, disqualification, or loss of prizes.
• The Mini App is provided as-is and as-available.

1. Acceptance of Terms

By accessing or using the Jokers of Neon Mini App, you agree to be bound by these Terms and our Privacy Policy. If you do not agree, you must not access or use the Mini App.

2. About the Mini App

The Jokers of Neon Mini App is a MiniPay-exclusive version of Jokers of Neon operated by Caravana Studio LLC. It is not operated by Opera or MiniPay. It is a live-service, competitive, skill-based strategy card game experience under ongoing development. Features, tournament formats, scoring systems, rewards, rankings, mechanics, and availability may change at any time.

3. Eligibility and MiniPay Access

You must be at least 18 years old to access or use the Mini App. The Mini App is available exclusively through MiniPay, and a valid MiniPay wallet is required to participate. No separate login is currently provided. You represent and warrant that you are legally permitted to use MiniPay, CELO, and the Mini App in your jurisdiction.

4. Live Service and Technical Operation

The Mini App may use multiple technical layers to operate, including MiniPay, blockchain infrastructure, analytics tools, and game services. Gameplay sessions, intermediate game state, or other technical processing may rely on Starknet-related testnet or associated infrastructure. Final game state, settlement, and official results are recorded to a Solidity smart contract on CELO. The user does not pay us to play, and we do not require users to bridge assets or transfer tokens to us in order to participate.

5. Skill-Based Gameplay, Randomness, and Official Results

The Mini App is intended as a skill-based strategy game. It may include random elements, such as randomized card-related outcomes or other gameplay variation, but tournament placement and game progression are intended to depend primarily on player skill and performance under the applicable rules. The official final record for games, settlements, and leaderboard outcomes is the applicable CELO smart contract record. If there is any discrepancy, delay, mismatch, or reconciliation issue involving MiniPay, frontend displays, off-chain services, Starknet-related processing, or CELO settlement, the CELO record prevails. We may correct rankings, scores, or results where reasonably necessary to address bugs, exploits, technical failures, or reconciliation errors.

6. Tournaments and Additional Tournament Rules

We may organize tournaments in the Mini App. Tournament details, including format, eligibility, duration, scoring, tie-breakers, prize pools, sponsorship, and payout conditions, may be described in separate tournament rules or announcements published before the tournament begins. Those tournament-specific rules supplement these Terms and control in the event of a conflict for that tournament.

7. Tournament Prizes

Some tournaments may award prizes denominated in USDT, USDC, or other disclosed digital assets on CELO. Prize pools may be funded by Caravana Studio LLC, sponsors, partners, or a combination of sources. Unless expressly stated otherwise in tournament-specific rules, no prize is guaranteed merely by participating. We may distribute prizes manually rather than automatically on-chain. We may require age, residency, wallet-control, sanctions, or identity verification when legally required or reasonably necessary for tournament administration, sponsor requirements, fraud prevention, or prize delivery. We may withhold, reduce, delay, cancel, or void prizes in cases of fraud, multi-accounting, bots, scripting, collusion, exploits, rule violations, sanctions concerns, legal restrictions, technical abuse, inability to verify eligibility, or other conduct that undermines tournament integrity. We will pay the network fees or transfer costs for prize delivery unless tournament-specific rules state otherwise.

8. Fees, Purchases, and Future Paid Formats

The Mini App currently does not sell goods or services, and tournament participation is currently free. We may introduce paid tournament formats, entry fees, or other monetized features in the future. If we do, the applicable rules, fees, payment conditions, and any additional terms will be disclosed before users are charged or enrolled.

9. Non-Custodial Nature and Wallet Risks

The Mini App is non-custodial with respect to user funds. We do not take custody of your tokens, do not operate deposit balances for you, and do not control your MiniPay wallet. You are solely responsible for your wallet, private access credentials, device security, and any third-party wallet or blockchain risks. We are not responsible for loss of wallet access, compromised devices, third-party wallet issues, smart contract vulnerabilities outside our reasonable control, congestion, chain outages, delayed confirmations, stablecoin depegging, RPC failures, or other blockchain-related risks.

10. User Conduct

You may not cheat, use bots, automate gameplay, script actions, engage in multi-accounting, collude with others, abuse exploits, reverse engineer the Mini App except where required by law, impersonate another person, misrepresent your eligibility, manipulate tournament outcomes, interfere with our systems, or otherwise undermine the integrity of the Mini App or any tournament.

11. Enforcement, Suspension, Disqualification, and Resets

We may investigate suspected violations and take any action we reasonably consider necessary to protect the Mini App, tournaments, players, sponsors, and systems. This may include warnings, score corrections, leaderboard adjustments, game-state resets, prize cancellation, prize forfeiture, disqualification, suspension, feature restriction, account or wallet blocking, or permanent bans.

12. Usernames and Limited User Content Rules

You may be allowed to choose or use a username. Your username must not infringe rights, impersonate others, contain unlawful or abusive material, or otherwise violate these Terms. We may remove, reset, or restrict usernames at our discretion where reasonably necessary for safety, moderation, legal compliance, or brand protection.

13. Intellectual Property

All software, artwork, designs, names, logos, interfaces, gameplay systems, audiovisual elements, tournament materials, and other content in the Mini App are owned by Caravana Studio LLC or its licensors. Subject to these Terms, we grant you a limited, revocable, non-exclusive, non-transferable license to access and use the Mini App for personal, non-commercial use.

14. Third-Party Services and Infrastructure

The Mini App relies on third-party services and infrastructure, including MiniPay, CELO, Starknet-related infrastructure, analytics providers such as Google Analytics, internet service providers, hosting, RPC providers, and other technical vendors. We are not responsible for third-party services, outages, policy changes, security failures, or acts or omissions by those third parties.

15. Export Controls, Sanctions, and Restricted Jurisdictions

You may not access or use the Mini App if doing so would violate applicable law, export controls, sanctions programs, or regulatory restrictions. We may restrict or block access in any jurisdiction, or for any user, where we reasonably believe access, participation, or prize delivery would create legal, compliance, sanctions, or operational risk.

16. Tournament Changes, Suspension, and Cancellation

We may modify, suspend, reschedule, cancel, or terminate tournaments, rankings, matchmaking, scoring systems, prize structures, or prize delivery where reasonably necessary due to bugs, exploits, fraud, technical failures, infrastructure issues, legal or compliance requirements, sponsor changes, force majeure, or other integrity or operational concerns.

17. Disclaimers

THE MINI APP, ALL TOURNAMENTS, ALL LEADERBOARDS, AND ALL RELATED SERVICES ARE PROVIDED AS IS AND AS AVAILABLE, WITHOUT WARRANTIES OF ANY KIND, WHETHER EXPRESS, IMPLIED, OR STATUTORY, INCLUDING WARRANTIES OF MERCHANTABILITY, FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE, TITLE, NON-INFRINGEMENT, ACCURACY, OR UNINTERRUPTED AVAILABILITY.

18. Limitation of Liability

TO THE MAXIMUM EXTENT PERMITTED BY LAW, CARAVANA STUDIO LLC, ITS AFFILIATES, LICENSORS, SPONSORS, SERVICE PROVIDERS, AND TEAM MEMBERS SHALL NOT BE LIABLE FOR ANY INDIRECT, INCIDENTAL, SPECIAL, CONSEQUENTIAL, EXEMPLARY, OR PUNITIVE DAMAGES, OR FOR ANY LOSS OF DATA, PROFITS, BUSINESS, GOODWILL, TOURNAMENT OPPORTUNITY, OR DIGITAL ASSET VALUE, ARISING OUT OF OR RELATED TO THE MINI APP, TOURNAMENTS, PRIZES, MINI PAY, STARKNET-RELATED PROCESSING, CELO SETTLEMENT, OR THESE TERMS.

19. Indemnification

You agree to indemnify, defend, and hold harmless Caravana Studio LLC, its affiliates, licensors, service providers, sponsors, and team members from and against claims, liabilities, damages, losses, and expenses arising out of or related to your access to or use of the Mini App, your participation in tournaments, your violation of these Terms, or your violation of law or third-party rights.

20. Updates to These Terms

We may modify these Terms at any time. The Effective Date above reflects the latest version. Continued use of the Mini App after updated Terms become effective constitutes acceptance of the revised Terms.

21. Governing Law and Exclusive Venue

These Terms are governed by the laws of the State of Delaware, USA, without regard to conflict of law principles. Any dispute arising out of or relating to these Terms or the Mini App shall be brought exclusively in the state or federal courts located in Delaware, USA, and you consent to the personal jurisdiction and venue of those courts.

22. Language

The authoritative version of these Terms is in English. Any translation is provided for convenience only. If there is any inconsistency between the English version and a translated version, the English version controls.

Copyright 2026 Caravana Studio LLC. All rights reserved.

support.title: Support
support.intro: If you have questions, found a bug, or need help with anything in the mini app, we are here to help.
support.email: If you need support, contact <email>gm@jokersofneon.com</email> and include as much detail as you can so we can assist you faster.
support.discord: You can also reach us on <discord>Discord</discord> if you prefer to contact us there.

how-to-play.title: How to play
how-to-play.video-title: How to play Jokers of Neon

01.title: Start with a basic deck
01.description: Every run begins with a standard poker deck and a fresh opportunity to build something powerful.

02.title: Play hands and beat rounds
02.description: Score points by creating poker hands and reaching the target score before running out of plays.

03.title: Visit shops and improve your build
03.description: Between rounds, buy Special Cards and items that strengthen your deck and open new strategic paths.

04.title: Build synergies and push deeper
04.description: The heart of the game is combining effects and scaling your score run after run, while adapting your build to tougher boss rounds called rage rounds.
